title: Even as It Bombards Kyiv, Russia’s Wider Military Campaign Has Largely Stalled
summary_full: Moscow can still inflict serious damage, but its forces are suffering higher casualties than their Ukrainian counterparts, analysts say.
summary_public: Moscow can still inflict serious damage, but its forces are suffering higher casualties than their Ukrainian counterparts, analysts say.
